## About this app

_arrow\_forward_

Brev is a fast, offline note-taking app for capturing thoughts, ideas, and voice memos instantly. No folders. No formatting. No setup. Just open the app and write.

✍️ CAPTURE

Type a note instantly from the home screen or use your voice — Brev transcribes continuously so you never lose a word mid-thought.

🏷️ ORGANIZE WITH @PREFIXES

Start a note with @work, @idea, @shopping — anything you want. Brev automatically tags and groups your notes as you write. No manual sorting required.

🔍 FIND ANYTHING FAST

Search by keyword or tap any @prefix to filter instantly. Your notes are always one tap away.

📋 SAVE FROM ANYWHERE

See something worth keeping? Select any text on your phone and save it directly to Brev without switching apps.

🔒 PRIVATE BY DESIGN

Everything stays on your device. No account required. No cloud sync. No tracking. No ads. Your thoughts are yours alone.

EVERYTHING ELSE

📌 Pin important notes to the top

🗂️ Archive notes you don't need right now

🔗 Share notes with any app

💾 Import and export your notes as JSON

🌙 Light, dark, and system theme support

Updated on

May 23, 2026

## Data safety

_arrow\_forward_[](https://play.google.com/store/apps/datasafety?id=com.shkurta.brev)
